question: Deploy DinoBrain v13 Observatory deterministic fossil graph design to GitHub main and publish installer release, preserving release/version alignment and keeping dinobrain-data private.

items.title: Task: Improve the DinoBrain Observatory dinosaur graph design after user feedback that the deployed v0
items.summary: status=partial | project=dinobrain | Improved the DinoBrain Observatory dinosaur graph candidate after user feedback that the previous deployed visual felt disappointing. Kept changes visual-only: increased graph canvas height, added aspect-preserving dino frame mapping, redistributed root/category nodes into head/neck/tail/leg roles, strengthened pose lock, reduced edge physics, and added live-data scaffold routes.
